display_name: Wabash Valley Farms Popcorn Kernels - Tender & White - 6 lb - 3 Pack
display_text: The Wabash Valley Farms set of three 6-pound bags of Tender and White Popcorn Kernels is a fun and exciting treat for popcorn lovers everywhere! With our gourmet popcorn kernels, you can enjoy snack time without worrying about pesky hulls. This variety of premium Tender and White popping corn is bred to have less hulls than most popcorn, so you can enjoy the tasty kernels without a time-consuming floss session afterwards. When prepared using the Whirley Pop Stovetop Popper, this generous sized bag of popcorn kernels makes approximately 72 batches of movie-theater-fresh popcorn without ever having to leave your kitchen. At Wabash Valley Farms, we take pride in the fact that our gourmet popping corn comes fresh from the farm with no chemicals added. Grown specifically for tenderness and taste, our flavorful Tender and White popcorn is a perfectly healthy snack that the entire family can enjoy. It’s the perfect choice for movie night, makes a great after school snack, and much more! Given alone or paired with our line of gourmet popcorn products from the Whirley Pop Shop, this tasty treat makes a great present for any gift-giving occasion and is sure to be enjoyed by popcorn enthusiasts of all ages!

LESS HULLS THAN MOST KERNELS: With our gourmet popcorn kernels, you can enjoy snack time without worrying about pesky hulls. This variety of premium Tender and White popping corn is bred to have less hulls than most popcorn.
LARGE BAG: When made in the Whirley Pop Stovetop Popper, 18 pounds of our Tender and White popping corn kernels makes approximately 72 batches of gourmet popcorn.

HEALTHY, FARM GROWN SNACK: Our premium Tender and White popcorn kernels come straight from the farm. At Wabash Valley Farms, our kernels are grown with no added chemicals, making our tasty popcorn a perfectly healthy snack that the whole family can enjoy!
MAKES A GREAT GIFT: When given alone or paired with the Whirley Pop Stovetop Popper, the Wabash Valley Farms Tender and White popcorn makes a perfect present for any gift-giving occasion!

display_name: Tasteful Selections, Organic Two Bite Honey Gold Potatoes oz, 24 Ounce
display_text: Tasteful Selections® began with multi-generational potato farmers who recognized an opportunity to expand the potato category to meet the busy consumer’s preference for simpler, convenient meals. Today, the Tasteful Selections® brand is the leader of this unique potato category. We pioneered bite-size potatoes as a convenient source of nutrition, flavor versatility and variety for everyday meals.

description: Tasteful Selections® began with multi-generational potato farmers who recognized an opportunity to expand the potato category to meet the busy consumer’s preference for simpler, convenient meals. features: USDA CERTIFIED ORGANIC HONEY GOLD: Available only through Tasteful Selections, our signature flavor Honey Gold provides the best taste of any gold potato. Enjoy the buttery sweet flavor, velvety golden flesh and delicate skin of Honey Gold bite-size potatoes.
BETTER FOR YOU: Bite-size potatoes are packed with Vitamin C, B6, iron, and protein. They are naturally fat and cholesterol-free and contain only 70-110 calories per serving.
PRE-WASHED: To save you time in the kitchen, our potatoes have been pre-washed; double and triple washed, depending on which product you have!
NO NEED TO PEEL: There is no need to peel our potatoes before cooking and eating. In fact, the skins are naturally full of flavor and good for you too!
FAST, EASY PREP: Meals in minutes! Because they are pre-washed, have no need to peel AND are consistently sized, the prep and cook time is minimal, making meals easier!
NON-GMO: Our products are NOT genetically modified
REAL FOOD: NO SUGARS ADDED, NATURALLY GLUTEN-FREE, VEGAN
HOW2RECYCLE: We have partnered with How2Recycle for standardized labeling. Our 16 and 24 oz. packaging is HDPE 2 fully recyclable.
USDA CERTIFIED ORGANIC
BITE SIZE POTATOES: 10-24 bite size potatoes per bag!

display_text:
SUGAR FREE SWEETENER: Devotion Nutrition Flex Flavors are flavored stevia sweetener packets that offer a sugar alternative for health conscious individuals who want to monitor calorie intake without sacrificing taste.

DELICIOUS, GUILT-FREE FLAVOR: Add the indulgent flavor of Boston Cream Donut you crave to your favorite foods and drinks without adding the calories of an actual donut. Does not leave any bitter aftertaste.

ADDS INSTANT FLAVOR: These multipurpose stevia packets can be added to anything that needs some Boston Cream Donut flavor! Perfect in coffee, tea, oatmeal, pancakes, yogurt, protein shakes, or baked into any recipe.

ZERO CALORIES & DIET FRIENDLY: Flex Flavors support weight management to help you meet your health and fitness goals. Keto friendly, diabetic friendly, low carb, sugar free, gluten free and 0 Weight Watchers Smart Points.

SMOOTH & EASY TO MIX: Includes 30 individually wrapped Boston Cream Donut Flex Flavors that mix, cook and bake like regular sugar. For smoothest consistency, continually stir while sprinkling into any food, drink or recipe.

display_name: Roastery Coast - DAILY NUTS | Whole Raw Brazil Nuts | Selenium | Bulk Raw Nuts (3 LB/1.3 kg) | Unsalted | Non-GMO | Certified Gluten Free | Kosher Certified | Brazilian nuts | Amazonian food
display_text:
Premium - Whole natural Brazil Nuts by Roastery Coast is naturally grown in Amazon rainforest. Raw Brazil nuts from Roastery Coast is the form of brazil nut you can enjoy as natural as it can be.

Nutrient Dense - Brazil nuts raw in form contains an excellent source of Selenium, a good source of antioxidant (Vitamin E), Plant protein, and minerals such as Magnesium. Surviving in a harsh environment, brazil nuts is a natural wonder nut snack to enjoy!

Healthy - No salt, Non-GMO Project Verified, Certified Gluten Free, and Kosher Certified. It is a true natural form of brazilian food you can enjoy! grab a handful for your Keto and paleo diet!

Recipe - Use a whole brazil nuts to make your favorite home-made nut paste mixed with tiger nuts, betel nut, baru nuts, and or other organic nuts! add about total 3 cups of variety of nuts into a blender, 1 tbsp of Pink Himalayan Salt, and blend for 10-12 minutes until texture is creamy!

Quality - Each bags are nitrogen flushed to maintain freshness, and are resealable. Keep in the refrigerator to maintain freshness! Every bag is guaranteed by Roastery Coast for a full refund if not satisfied!

We decided to cut through the clutter and focus on the simple things to get back to human.

Great in a salad, sandwich, wrap, or as a delicious dip
Great for camping trips, hiking, backpacking or keep in case of emergencies
Quality chicken breast in every package
Your go-to sandwich meat or snack
raw.title: Underwood Meat Chicken Spread, 4.25 Oz

display_name: Death Wish Coffee Valhalla Java Single Serve Pods - Extra Kick of Caffeine - Dark Roast Coffee Pods - Made with USDA Certified Organic Fair Trade Arabica and Robusta Beans (20 Count)
display_text:
SUPER FUEL FOR LIFE IN THE FAST LANE: Say hello to better mornings with the world's strongest coffee, featuring an otherworldly caffeine boost that you have yet to experience. Each Valhalla Java Pods is a mini coffee pod that comes from the nutrient-rich volcanic earth of Indonesia and Central and South America, giving you the strength to fuel your passion with every single sip. It takes just one sip to fall in love with our coffee pods but don't take our word for it- try it for yourself!

UNCOMPROMISING FLAVOR: We've carefully sourced, selected, and expertly roasted premium Arabica and Robusta coffee beans for our coffee pod blend from five (5) different bean origins around the world. The result is a smooth and earthy aroma of coffee beans that fills you up and leaves you feeling fresh, energized, and ready to conquer the day. If our medium roast coffee pods are good enough for the world's most powerful guitarist Zakk Wylde, they're probably good enough for us too.

HIGH CAFFEINE KICK: Our coffee pods ensure you’re getting the best coffee possible without the bitterness or jitters. This breakfast blend is great for those needing a fresh brew with a high caffeine kick! One sip will have you saying goodbye to shop-bought coffee forever.

FAIR TRADE AND ORGANIC: Each coffee pod is made with only the highest quality USDA Certified Organic and Fair Trade beans to supply you with a natural caffeine boost that not only empowers you but also our coffee bean farmers around the world. Additionally, we made sure that our coffee pods were recyclable so that you can feel good after every brew.

TRY IT RISK-FREE: The Death Wish Promise is that we are so confident that you'll love our coffee pods that we offer a no-questions-asked refund on your order if you don't absolutely love it. Try our coffee single serve pods totally risk-free!

videos.title: Perfect

display_name: The Republic of Tea Organic U•Matcha Green Tea Nespresso-Compatible Recyclable Pod (50 count)
display_text:
A NEW WORLD OF GREEN TEA: This ceremonial-style matcha tea provides a bright jade cup that is fresh, frothy and delightful with all the health benefits green tea has to offer. Add steamed milk, whipped cream, and/or sweetener as desired.

ENERGIZING: Sip and enjoy the smooth, velvet texture and rich grassy springtime flavor. This energizing tea is great anytime your body and mind need a little boost!

HOW TO USE: Simply insert a pod and use it in accordance with machine instructions. Select the espresso button for a stronger cup or select the lungo button for a milder cup.

NESPRESSO-COMPATIBLE: These recyclable pods are compatible with the Original Nespresso machines.

GLUTEN & SUGAR FREE: This tea is gluten and sugar-free, so you can sip away without worry.
